message: The world is independent of my will.
Even if everything we wished were to happen,
this would only be, so to speak, a favour of fate,
for there is no logical connexion between will and world,
which would guarantee this, and the assumed physical connexion itself we could not again will.
Ludwig Josef Johann Wittgenstein - "Tractatus Logico-Philosophicus"
I wonder how long it's been since my twin brother died.
Time has stopped for me since that day.
That's why I still carry around that doll.
If only I was a shadow, and that doll was the real me...
I thought that would be nice.
If only I could disappear...
Those two saved me.
One of them was Yuki-san.
She came back to me.
She brought Tomo Nii-san with her, and they came back to me.
Minkami Yuki-san... A kind old sister.
Tomo Nii-san loved her.

name: Master
message: "Huh? You're here awfully early."

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, good morning."

name: Master
message: "How was he today?"

name: Hasaki
message: "It was Tomo Nii-san this morning."

name: Master
message: "Oh, so it was Tomosane this time."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yes, and he was as cold as ever."

name: Master
message: "I figured as much. He's always been like that, though."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yes, he's always like that."

name: Master
message: "Haa... I wonder if he'll ever get better."

name: Hasaki
message: "Ahaha... If he went to the hospital..."

name: Master
message: "It's not a sickness that he has."

name: Master
message: "That's why Yuki came. She came to save Tomosane."

name: Hasaki
message: "Master..."

name: Master
message: "A curse... That's a curse..."

name: Master
message: "There's no way that's just PTSD or anything like that."

name: Master
message: "He was the best student I had."

name: Master
message: "He had a strong heart. He wouldn't leave you behind just because of something like that. He wouldn't just run away."

name: Hasaki
message: "A curse... is it?"

name: Master
message: "That's why Yuki came to him."

name: Master
message: "Because she can fight alongside him."

name: Hasaki
message: "Against the curse?"

name: Master
message: "That's the curse of the shrine maiden in the town of the walking dead. The curse of the savior. The two of them should be able to beat it together, though."

name: Hasaki
message: "Okay."
A curse.
The curse of the town of the walking dead.
The people in Sawaimura, especially the people of the Mamiya dojo, believe in that.
The doctors call it Post Traumatic Stress Disorder.
They say it's trauma caused by that incident.
That's the reason Nii-san went mad.
Whether it's the curse of a dead boy...
Or PTSD...
I don't know what the truth is.
But I have one hope.

name: Hasaki
message: "Tomo Nii-san will come back, right?"

name: Master
message: "Of course. If he doesn't, I'll have to give God a good punch right in the nose when I meet him."

name: Hasaki
message: "Ahahaha. Okay."
God...
God, who created the world in six days.
And rested on the seventh day.
Why didn't he use that day to rid the world of all pain and suffering?
Why did he give my brother such a cruel fate?
